alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from GSO 9:2022. This technical regulation covers mandatory labelling requirements, which typically include allergen declarations, nutritional information (including sodium), ingredients list, net content, and manufacturer details.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from GSO 2055-1:2015 for specific criteria. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for food to be considered Halal, impacting ingredients, processing, and labelling for Halal claims.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from GSO 150-1:2013 for specific products/categories. This technical regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for various food products.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Production, processing, use, cooking, or preservation methods for food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must conform to MHLW criteria. Food or additives must not be produced, processed, used, cooked, or preserved using methods that do not conform to MHLW criteria.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination or foreign substances in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale. Prohibited for sale, collection, production, import, processing, use, cooking, storage, or display for sale, if likely to cause harm due to contamination or the addition of foreign substances or on other grounds.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Ingredients of food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must conform to MHLW standards. Food or additives that do not conform to MHLW criteria must not be sold or imported. Food or additives that do not conform to MHLW standards must not be produced, imported, processed, used, cooked, preserved, or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, pharmaceuticals for animals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must not exceed MHLW-specified quantities. Food containing residues exceeding MHLW-specified quantities (deemed unlikely to cause harm) must not be produced, imported, processed, used, cooked, preserved for sale, or sold. This does not apply if standards concerning ingredients of food under paragraph (1) have been established for the residual limit.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale. Prohibited for sale, collection, production, import, processing, use, cooking, storage, or display for sale, unless MHLW specifies they are unlikely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogen contamination in food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale. Prohibited for sale, collection, production, import, processing, use, cooking, storage, or display for sale, if contaminated with pathogens or suspected to be so, and likely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Rotten, deteriorated, or immature food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited for sale. Prohibited for sale, collection, production, import, processing, use, cooking, storage, or display for sale, unless unlikely to cause harm and recognized as edible.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory compliance.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be assessed for safety by SFA. Only food additives that have been assessed by SFA are permitted for use in food products sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits for contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory compliance.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA's regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition on import or sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Residues of diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. As defined under Regulation 29(3) of the Food Regulations, 'Veterinary drugs' include antibiotic and oestrogen.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on food labels. Applies only to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Eggs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Gluten-containing cereals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mango
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Milk and goat milk
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Peanuts
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sesame seeds
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Soybeans
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if 10 or more milligrams per kilogram of food. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen above the specified limit.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Tree nuts
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. Required for prepackaged foods containing this allergen.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required for specific allergen declaration requirements as part of food labeling. Inferred from general food labeling requirements, as allergen declaration is a critical component.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with food standards for contaminants.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Toxic Substances and Veterinary Drug Residues
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with food standards for toxic substances and veterinary drug residues; verification required for specific MRLs.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Food Labeling and Nutrition Labeling
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with food labeling and nutrition labeling requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Microbiology Limits - Pathogenic Microorganisms
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with standards for pathogenic microorganisms.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Delisted (not permitted for use). Refer to 21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30 for details.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food (with exceptions as noted in regulations). Refer to 21 CFR Part 189 for details on prohibited substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. Sesame was added as the 9th major food allergen effective January 1, 2023, by the FASTER Act.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level. Specific action levels also exist for Brazil nuts, peanuts and peanut products, and pistachio nuts.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet defined standard for gluten content. Compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods.. The FDA issued a final rule defining 'gluten-free' for food labeling and later established compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Establishments must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling. Part of the 'Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food' rule (CGMP & PC rule, 21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. Identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in parentheses after ingredient name OR in a 'contains' statement immediately after/next to ingredient list. Specific types of tree nuts, fish, and Crustacean shellfish must be declared.. This requirement is mandated by FALCPA and the FASTER Act.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on food labels when concentration is ≥10 parts per million total sulfites. Required due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals (e.g., asthma).

alerts.title: Removed: Bangladesh Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Specific food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Specific provisions for food additives are available in the searchable GSFA Online Database, which is regularly updated. Users are encouraged to consult the Preamble for interpretation.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and decisions by the Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF). Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) and Guideline Levels for contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants in food and feed to protect human health. These levels are recommended by the Codex Alimentarius Commission to be legally permitted and are detailed in the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and through the work of the Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF).

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins, metals (arsenic, lead, mercury), radionuclides
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Codex has established Maximum Levels (MLs) for specific contaminants including mycotoxins, metals such as arsenic, lead, and mercury, and radionuclides. These MLs are designed to ensure food does not contain contaminants at levels which could threaten human health and are detailed in relevant Codex texts.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives and their conditions of use
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via database/regulation. Specific approved food additives and their conditions of use, including limits, must be verified by consulting the EU Additives Database, which is based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via regulation. Specific microbiological criteria for foods, including limits for various pathogens and their toxins, must be verified by consulting Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. This regulation also includes process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from GSO 150-2:2013 for specific products/categories. This standard provides guidelines for optional shelf life periods for food products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs must be verified by consulting the full GSO 9:2022 standard.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 standard.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed on the BPOM JDIH website, particularly those under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed on the BPOM JDIH website, particularly those under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed on the BPOM JDIH website, particularly those under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed on the BPOM JDIH website, particularly those under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Microbiological Contaminants

alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed on the BPOM JDIH website, particularly those under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium Content
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific limits and requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed on the BPOM JDIH website, particularly those under 'Pangan Olahan'.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives (general regulation)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Compliance with MHLW regulations regarding food additives is required. Additives must be specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Use and sale of additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required (MHLW approval). Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives), preparations, and food containing additives must not be sold, produced, imported, processed, used, stored, or displayed for sale, except when MHLW specifies them as unlikely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required (Positive List System). Compliance with the 'Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food' is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Imported food/additives management certification
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food and additives specified by MHLW Order as requiring 'certification of the conditions of food sanitation management at the production site' must not be imported for sale unless accompanied by certificates from the exporting country's governmental organization.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Imported food/additives process control
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food and additives specified by MHLW Order as requiring 'measures to control particularly important processes' must not be imported for sale unless produced/processed in MHLW-specified countries/regions/facilities that actually take those measures.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Nutrition Labeling, Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations apply to nutrition labeling, food with health claims, and food for special dietary uses.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc.
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Compliance with the 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act' is required. These standards cover various aspects including ingredients, production methods, and limits for food and additives.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Combined Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid, benzoic acid)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Calculation tool must be used for permitted levels. Use the Calculation Tool for Class II Chemical Preservatives to calculate the permitted levels that should be used.
